CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Carlos Jato, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.771.6174, for plaintiffs Orlando Ek;
William E. Jemmott, of Law Offices of Raffalow, Bretoi & Adams, Tel. 877.707.7992, for defendants Rolando Riagoza.
